summary: Full backend + frontend testing of Skill Tank LMS. All core flows working: login (student/instructor/admin), dashboard, course catalog with category filtering, certifications page, learn page with video/chatbot/quiz/notes tabs, and AI lesson coach. Two backend issues found: /api/auth/callback returns 404 (Emergent auth callback route missing from backend) and /api/enrollments returns 404 (endpoint uses /api/dashboard instead).

critical.issue: Returns 404 - backend route missing. Frontend AuthCallback component (App.js line 313) expects this route for Emergent OAuth flow to work. Without it, Google login via Emergent auth will fail after redirect.

minor.issue: Returns 404 - enrollment data served via /api/dashboard instead. Not a user-visible bug but test expectation mismatch. Frontend uses /api/dashboard correctly.

integration_issues.issue: Button labeled 'Continue with Google' present on login page but couldn't verify it redirects to auth.emergentagent.com (not testable via automation without triggering external OAuth flow). Backend /api/auth/callback is 404 which would break the callback.

issues: Keyboard Enter key doesn't submit message - only Send button works. Minor UX issue.

action_items: CRITICAL: Add GET /api/auth/callback route to backend main.py to handle Emergent OAuth redirect. Should receive 'session_id' param and call the google-emergent login logic.
Minor: Consider adding keyboard Enter submit support in Chatbot textarea for better UX
critical_code_review_comments: Backend /api/auth/callback (GET) is missing - the frontend AuthCallback component at App.js:313 calls this endpoint after Emergent OAuth redirect but backend doesn't have it, only has POST /api/auth/google-emergent
Login response uses 'access_token' key but test_credentials.md says 'token' - frontend should use access_token (check if frontend reads it correctly)
server.py only imports app from main - correct, backend starts fine

success_rate.frontend: 90% (all major flows work except Google OAuth callback chain)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing seeded demo accounts
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core LMS flows working: login, dashboard, catalog with filters, learn page with AI chatbot (working via Claude via emergentintegrations). Main outstanding issue: /api/auth/callback GET route missing in backend - needed for Emergent Google OAuth completion. Backend uses SQLite not MongoDB. Login response key is 'access_token' not 'token'.

auth_callback_404.description: Frontend AuthCallback component navigates to /auth/callback and extracts session_id from URL params, then calls backend. Backend has POST /api/auth/google-emergent but NOT GET /api/auth/callback.
auth_callback_404.mitigation: Add @app.get('/api/auth/callback') route in main.py that reads session_id from query params and calls the google-emergent logic
